name: AX6000 WiFi 6 Router
description: Tri-band WiFi 6 router with 6000 Mbps combined speed. Supports up to 200 devices simultaneously. Equipped with OFDMA and MU-MIMO technology. Compatible with all ISPs and modem types including DOCSIS 3.0 and 3.1.

faqs.q: Does this router work with Xfinity modems?
faqs.a: Yes, it is compatible with all DOCSIS 3.0 and 3.1 modems used by Xfinity.

faqs.q: How many devices can connect simultaneously?
faqs.a: Up to 200 devices can connect simultaneously using OFDMA technology.

name: ProBook X14 Laptop
description: Business ultrabook with Intel Core i7-1355U processor, 16GB LPDDR5 RAM, 512GB NVMe SSD. Features a 14-inch IPS display with 2560x1600 resolution and up to 12 hours battery life. Weighs 1.4kg.

faqs.a: No, the 16GB LPDDR5 RAM is soldered and cannot be upgraded.
Yes, via the HDMI 2.0 port and USB-C Thunderbolt 4 port simultaneously.

name: SmartHub 4K Streaming Device
description: 4K HDR streaming stick with Dolby Vision, HDR10+ support. Includes voice remote with Alexa built-in. Supports Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, YouTube. Requires HDMI 2.0 port and 5GHz WiFi for 4K streaming.

faqs.q: Do I need a 4K TV to use this device?
faqs.a: No, it works with any HDMI TV. 4K content requires a 4K-compatible TV.
A WiFi connection is required for streaming content.
